requirements.summary: Investigate and identify why the account creation button does not respond when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Identify the specific cause of the unresponsive button behavior
Document any console errors or warnings related to the button click
Verify that the button's onClick handler is properly attached

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive console logging and error boundaries around the account creation form to capture any JavaScript errors, validation failures, or event handler issues that may be preventing the button from responding
Add detailed logging to the login mutation to track when the mutation is called, its parameters, and any errors or state changes during the authentication process
Enhance error logging in the login function to capture AuthClient initialization failures, identity delegation errors, or any blocking conditions during the Internet Identity authentication flow

requirements.summary: Fix the account creation button to execute signup process with proper user feedback
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the account creation button triggers the signup flow
Button shows a loading state while processing the request
Users receive clear feedback on success or failure of account creation
Form validation prevents submission with empty or invalid fields

file_operations.description: Fix the account creation form by ensuring the submit button's onClick handler properly calls the login mutation, add form validation for name and email fields, implement loading state display during authentication, and add success/error toast notifications for user feedback
Ensure the login mutation properly handles the authentication flow, returns appropriate loading states, and provides clear error messages that can be displayed to users in the UI
Update the AuthButton component to properly display loading states using the Loader2 icon and disable the button during authentication to prevent multiple submissions
